svg.text: Museum Information Retrieval | Search, retrieve, and explore collection knowledge | Two linked demo scenarios

g.text: Search museum collection information: [user typed or selected scenario query]
Search story, material, age, cultural meaning.
All pages update to keris object records and evidence.
Search motifs, maker memory, oral history.
All pages update to beadwork records and transcripts.
One selected museum topic controls Time Search, Evidence, Lens, Journey, Risk, Guided Explain, Voice, and Saved Board.
Current topic: [Malay keris story] or [Nyonya beadwork voices]
Selected layer: [Collection Layer] from Time Search
Claim changes with selected scenario and layer.
Topic node: [selected museum object or record set]
Goal: Build an evidence-based museum knowledge path
Checks missing context before user trusts the retrieved information
Output changes by selected object, source, lens, and risk check.
Uses collection records, exhibition notes, and oral-history evidence.
Keris: object story, symbolism, historical context.
Beadwork: craft technique, family memory, oral history.
Shows reliability, source type, object ID, transcript ID, or exhibition note.
Content changes by scenario and selected evidence card.
Visitor, student, curator, and accessibility explanations differ by topic.
Supports perspective taking before building the knowledge path.
